# UPDATE: Deep Dive WeRide: Business Model, Unit Economics, Fleet Data, Financials and More

**From:** The AV Market Strategist <avmarketstrategist@substack.com>  
**Date:** 2026-05-28T06:58:39.000Z

---

Hi,
As promised, I keep the company deep dives current. This is the first update to the WeRide profile.
Here is what changed:
	•	Q1 2026 financials
	•	Global deployments overview by status: testing, safety driver, driver-out
	•	Unit economics
	•	Fleet size growth
	•	Zurich Airport: front-row safety driver removed
	•	ADAS business achievements and strategy
Read the updated deep dive here: 
Enjoy.
